message:
fix(web): improve tool not found handling in learn tools page

Changed from server-side notFound() to client-side redirect with a
friendly message:
- Shows "Tool not found" message with link back to Learning Hub
- Uses useEffect with router.replace for soft redirect
- Provides better UX than server 404 page

This handles edge cases where users navigate to invalid tool URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
